description: Comprehensive nutrition and recipe management platform providing access to food databases, barcode scanning, image analysis, and detailed recipe information.

tools.name: search_foods
tools.description: Search the nutrition database for foods by name or keyword with regional and language localization.

query.description: Search query string to match against food names and descriptions.

region.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for localizing search results to a specific market (e.g., 'US', 'GB', 'CA'). Defaults to 'US'.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for result localization (e.g., 'en', 'es', 'fr'). Defaults to 'en'.

foods.description: List of food items matching the search criteria.

food_id.description: Unique identifier of the food item in the FatSecret nutrition database.

food_name.description: Display name of the food item.

food_type.description: Classification of the food: 'Generic' for whole foods, 'Brand' for packaged products, or 'Restaurant' for prepared foods.

brand_name.description: Brand or manufacturer name for packaged food products.

food_url.description: URL linking to the full food details page on FatSecret.

food_description.description: Brief summary including primary nutritional highlights such as calorie content.

tools.name: get_food_details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed nutritional information for a specific food item by its unique identifier.

food_id.description: Unique identifier of the food item in the FatSecret nutrition database.
Unique identifier of the food item in the FatSecret nutrition database.

food_name.description: Display name of the food item.

servings.description: List of available serving sizes and their corresponding weights or volumes.

carbs.description: Total carbohydrate content measured in grams (g).

fat.description: Total fat content measured in grams (g).

fiber.description: Dietary fiber content measured in grams (g).

sugar.description: Total sugar content measured in grams (g).

vitamins.description: Vitamin and mineral content with nutrient names as keys and amounts as values.

allergens.description: List of allergens present in the food, such as 'gluten' or 'dairy'.

dietary_preferences.description: Dietary classification flags indicating suitability for specific diets.

is_vegan.description: Indicates if the food contains no animal products.

is_vegetarian.description: Indicates if the food contains no meat or fish.

is_gluten_free.description: Indicates if the food contains no gluten.

images.description: URLs to food images available in various resolutions.

tools.name: search_by_barcode
tools.description: Look up food and product information using a UPC or EAN barcode number with support for global barcode databases.

barcode.description: UPC or EAN barcode number to look up.

region.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for localizing search results to a specific market (e.g., 'US', 'GB', 'CA'). Defaults to 'US'.

food_id.description: Unique identifier of the food item in the FatSecret nutrition database.

food_name.description: Display name of the food item.

brand.description: Brand or manufacturer name of the scanned product.

package_size.description: Net weight or volume of the packaged product as shown on the label.

ingredients.description: Complete list of ingredients as shown on the product packaging.

allergen_info.description: Allergen warnings and advisory statements from the packaging.

country.description: Country of manufacture or primary market for the product.

tools.name: analyze_food_image
tools.description: Analyze a food image using AI to detect food items, estimate portion sizes, and calculate nutritional content.

image_path.description: File system path to the food image to be analyzed.

detected_foods.description: List of food items identified by the AI vision model.

estimated_weight_g.description: Estimated total weight of the detected food in grams.

confidence.description: AI confidence score for the detection and portion estimation, ranging from 0.0 to 1.0.

nutrition_estimate.description: Estimated nutritional content based on detected foods and portion sizes.

suggestions.description: Alternative food suggestions for user confirmation when confidence is low.

tools.name: search_recipes
tools.description: Search for recipes with optional filtering by dietary preferences and maximum calorie limits.

query.description: Search query string to match against recipe names and descriptions.

diet.description: Dietary filter to restrict results: 'vegan', 'vegetarian', 'gluten_free', or 'keto'.

max_calories.description: Maximum number of calories per serving to include in results.

recipes.description: List of recipes matching the search and filter criteria.

recipe_id.description: Unique identifier of the recipe in the FatSecret database.

recipe_description.description: Brief summary or tagline describing the recipe.

prep_time.description: Estimated preparation time as a human-readable string.

cook_time.description: Estimated cooking time as a human-readable string.

servings.description: Number of servings the recipe yields.

ingredients.description: List of ingredients required for the recipe.

tools.name: get_recipe_details
tools.description: Retrieve complete recipe information including ingredients, cooking instructions, and detailed nutritional data.

recipe_id.description: Unique identifier of the recipe in the FatSecret database.
Unique identifier of the recipe in the FatSecret database.

recipe_description.description: Brief summary or tagline describing the recipe.

servings.description: Number of servings the recipe produces.

difficulty.description: Difficulty level of the recipe preparation.

ingredients.description: List of ingredients with quantities, units, and food references.

carbs.description: Total carbohydrate content measured in grams (g).

fat.description: Total fat content measured in grams (g).

images.description: URLs to recipe images in various sizes.
